Variables.Name: Swing1LimitDegrees
Variables.Description: Angle of movement along the XY plane. This defines the first symmetric angle of the cone.

Variables.Name: Swing2LimitDegrees
Variables.Description: Angle of movement along the XZ plane. This defines the second symmetric angle of the cone.

Variables.Name: Swing1Motion
Variables.Description: Indicates whether the Swing1 limit is used.

Variables.Name: Swing2Motion
Variables.Description: Indicates whether the Swing2 limit is used.
